title: Verify heltec_wifi_lora32_v3_esp32s3_procpu proxy builds for xiao_s3 replacement
description: Test that using -b heltec_wifi_lora32_v3_esp32s3_procpu with appropriate overlays successfully proxies the retired xiao_s3_wio_sx1262 target without build errors. Update any bridge-zephyr configs if needed.
